title: DECORO 36x24Inch Black Photo Frames, 61x91cm, Black
features: PRESERVE YOUR LIFE MEMORY: This elegant 36x26inch , 61x91cm black photo frame will allow you to showcase your most treasured memories in style. Its modern, sleek form makes it the ideal option for tastefully showcasing prints, posters, or pictures.

LANDSCAPE OR PORTRAIT ORIENTATION: This frame is perfect for showcasing your favourite poster, jigsaw puzzle, or stunning scenery. It's simple to show your photographs in any orientation with the wall hanging mounts.
SIZE: Image display area, measures 61x91cm (approx). The frame profile has a depth of 15mm and a width of 30mm.
description: Your favourite photos can be easily hung and can create a statement when placed in our photo frame. Regardless of the size of picture frame that is required, you may find something ideal from our extensive selection of frames for every space in your house.
